scene.description: Glass radar rings rotate counter to each other. Coral signal dots appear and fade at intersections.

render_prompt: 8 second seamless loop, 16:9. Abstract glass radar rings rotate in opposite directions with real 3D depth. Coral signal dots pulse at intersections. NOT a still pan. Loopable.
